pkgmetadata.longdescription: eget locates, downloads, and extracts prebuilt binaries from GitHub, GitLab, Gitea/Forgejo, and SourceForge releases. It filters release assets by OS/arch, verifies SHA-256 checksums, extracts common archive formats, and can manage a set of frequently used tools with add/list/update/uninstall commands. This is a fork of zyedidia/eget with additional features.
